name: Tree
summary: Accessible WAI-ARIA tree over a `nodes` hierarchy (label via `getLabel`): `expanded`/`onExpandedChange` for disclosure and the canonical `selectionMode` + `selected`/`onSelectionChange` (id arrays) for `none`/`single`/`multiple` selection. Use it for nested data like file trees and outlines — reach for `List` when items are flat.

props.name: getTextValue
props.description:
Plain-text accessor for typeahead (since `getLabel` may return a node).
Falls back to `getLabel` when it returns a string/number.

props.name: defaultExpanded
props.description: Node ids that are expanded (canonical expansion trio, matches Accordion).

props.name: iconToggleOnly
props.description: When true, only the disclosure glyph toggles expansion (not the whole row).

props.name: preset
props.description: One or many style-preset names registered via `definePreset()`

props.name: selectionMode
props.description:
How many items may be selected at once.
- `'none'` — selection is disabled (the default for components that gate it).
- `'single'` — at most one item is selected.
- `'multiple'` — any number of items may be selected.

Canonical replacement for the former per-component flags (e.g. Table's
removed `selectable`).

props.name: selected
props.description: Controlled selection as an array of selection units (`K`).

props.name: defaultSelected
props.description: Uncontrolled initial selection as an array of selection units (`K`).

props.name: onSelectionChange
props.description:
Fired when the selection changes (user interaction only — never on mount
or on a derived prune that merely keeps the array in sync). Receives the
full next selection as an array of selection units.

bestPractices: Use stable, unique node `id`s — they are the selection/expansion unit (`expanded`, `selected`, and `onSelectionChange` all speak ids), so they must survive re-renders.
Control disclosure with the canonical trio `expanded`/`defaultExpanded`/`onExpandedChange` (string[] of expanded ids, shared with Accordion). Omit for uncontrolled.

Control selection with `selectionMode` + `selected`/`defaultSelected` (string[]) + `onSelectionChange(ids)`: `'single'` (default) keeps one id, `'multiple'` toggles ids in/out (the tree advertises `aria-multiselectable`), `'none'` disables selection — rows still expand/collapse and stay keyboard-navigable but never get `aria-selected`.

Keyboard + typeahead come built in: Up/Down move, Right expands then descends, Left collapses then climbs to the parent, Home/End jump, `*` expands all siblings, Enter/Space selects, and typing a letter jumps to the next matching label. Provide `getTextValue` when `getLabel` returns a node (not a string) so typeahead has text to match.

All three `variant`s (`chevron`/`list`/`files`) render one structure — each expanded parent owns a nested `role=group`, with correct `aria-level`/`aria-setsize`/`aria-posinset`. Rows never steal focus on mount (roving `tabIndex` makes the tree Tab-reachable).
Mark non-actionable nodes `disabled` on the `TreeNode` — they render `aria-disabled`, never select or toggle, but remain navigable so users can move past them.

Touch-friendly automatically: each row floors at ≥44px on coarse pointers (40px under `compact`) with the mobile chrome kit, and the disclosure glyph carries an invisible ≥44px hit area for `iconToggleOnly` mode. Colours follow the theme intent contract (hover strictly subtler than selected; AA text contrast in both modes).

Avoid over-nesting; flatten deep hierarchies and add search/filter for large trees. (Tree is not virtualized — keep visible node counts reasonable.) Use `iconToggleOnly` when row clicks should select without toggling.
